Sandbox_CP_KCM_KeyChainManagerPage_Compa: Compass is needed to show key origin
When enabled, key origin only will be shown if you have a compass in your inventory.
Sandbox_CP_KCM_KeyChainManagerPage_Forag: Minimal level of "Foraging" skill to display direction on key origin. 0 to disable level dependency, 11 for turn off completely
Minimal level of "Foraging" skill to display distance to key origin. 0 to disable level dependency, 11 for turn off completely
Minimal level of "Foraging" skill to display coordinates of key origin. 0 to disable level dependency, 11 for turn off completely
Sandbox_CP_KCM_KeyChainManagerPage_Dista: The base time during which the line from the player to the location associated with the key will be displayed

Each level of Foraging will add some amount of percentage from base time value. For example: base time is 5, modifier is 10, foraging level is 6, (5*10*6)/100=3. Tre minutes will add to base time and result time will be 5+3 = 8
Sandbox_CP_KCM_KeyChainManagerPage_IsDeb: Leave it as is (disabled). This flag determines whether the mod should load in debug mode (even when the game is launched normally). It's needed for quick troubleshooting and diagnostics of the mod
